title: stachys recta
intro: Stachys recta, also known as narrow-leaved hedgenettle, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Stachys recta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and boost the immune system. The herb can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
